subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the lights of divine knowledge in the days of his Lord, the All-Merciful, and hath voiced His praise amidst the multitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار العرفان فی ایام ربه الرحمن و نطق بثنائه بین ملا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @power of prayer, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
